test.name: Wikipedia request should not trigger translation
test.description: User asks for the Wikipedia article about a foreign-language record type. That's search-wikipedia — translation is for translating SPECIFIC text content. A user wanting to understand what a 'Kirchenbuch' is wants background, not translation.

input.user_message: Look up Kirchenbuch on Wikipedia — I want to understand what kind of records these are.

negative.explanation: The user explicitly named Wikipedia and asked to look up a concept. search-wikipedia is the saved-Wikipedia-summary workflow. translation translates SPECIFIC text content from a foreign language to English; it doesn't produce Wikipedia summaries about record types.

judge_context: Should route to search-wikipedia rather than translating the word 'Kirchenbuch' in lieu of a Wikipedia summary
